scripts.build: pnpm --filter web run build && cp -r apps/web/dist dist
scripts.worker:secret:slack-bot: pnpm --filter email_ingest exec wrangler secret put SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
scripts.worker:secret:slack-bot:slack-app: pnpm --filter slack_app exec wrangler secret put SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
scripts.worker:secret:slack-bot:queue-consumer: pnpm --filter queue_consumer exec wrangler secret put SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
scripts.worker:secret:slack-signing: pnpm --filter slack_app exec wrangler secret put SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET
scripts.worker:secret:openai: pnpm --filter queue_consumer exec wrangler secret put OPENAI_API_KEY
scripts.worker:secret:postmark: pnpm --filter queue_consumer exec wrangler secret put POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter email_ingest exec wrangler d1 execute a2agents-comms --file ../../../infra/cloudflare/schema.sql
scripts.db:migrate:slack-operator: pnpm --filter email_ingest exec -- wrangler d1 execute a2agents-comms --remote --file /Users/benjaminbergstein/src/a2agents.com/infra/cloudflare/migrations/0003_slack_operator.sql
